1.note: The race saw 3 virtual safety cars, which can hand the field cheap stops and reset the gaps. The model gives a safety car a random per-lap chance but cannot know this race's actual timing, so where a real caution forced an extra stop our call reads short. 3 cars retired and 2 did not start. The model does not simulate mechanical failures or crashes, so those cars are predicted for a full race they never finished.
